name: studymate-graph
description: 学伴图谱：以知识图谱画布为中心的学习平台 monorepo。

scripts.bootstrap: npm install && npm run verify:runtimes && cd backend && go mod download
scripts.lint: npm run verify:backend:format && npm run verify:config-safety && npm run typecheck && npm run verify:docs
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:user && npm run build:admin && playwright test
scripts.test:search:e2e: npm run build:user && playwright test e2e/v1-public-flows.spec.ts --grep "search page renders grouped backend results"
scripts.verify:search: npm run test:search:frontend && npm run test:search:backend && npm run test:search:e2e && npm run verify:docs
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage:user && npm run test:coverage:admin && npm run test:coverage:graph && npm run test:coverage:backend
scripts.ci: npm run verify:runtimes && npm run verify:secrets && npm run lint && npm run build:user && npm run build:admin && npm run test:user && npm run test:admin && npm --workspace @studymate/graph-core run test && npm run test:e2e && cd backend && go test ./... && cd .. && npm run verify:docs
